text.source_text: यत्पुनः कारणविषयं विगानं दर्शितम् ‘ असद्वा इदमग्र आसीत् ’ (तै. उ. २ । ७ । १) इत्यादि , तत्परिहर्तव्यम् ; अत्रोच्यते —
text.transliteration_iast: yatpunaḥ kāraṇaviṣayaṃ vigānaṃ darśitam ‘ asadvā idamagra āsīt ’ (tai. u. 2 | 7 | 1) ityādi , tatparihartavyam ; atrocyate —

translation.literal_translation: As for the discrepancy raised regarding the cause, from statements such as 'in the beginning this was asat,' that too must be answered. The reply is now given.
translation.technical_translation: Transition line: introduces formal resolution of the asat-based causal objection and signals that prior Brahman-causality conclusions remain to be defended via contextual pull-through.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence
